blockers.description: Tests mock processEvolutionQueue and worker-level imports but dispatch logic moved to unmocked EvolutionTaskDispatcher. Mock setup doesn't reach dispatcher code paths.
blockers.workaround: Option A: Accept as architectural consequence. Option B: Mock EvolutionTaskDispatcher in tests.

decisions.decision: Created thin processEvolutionQueue wrapper for backward compat

decisions.rationale: Recovery modifications were not persisted before
Tests import this from worker but it was moved to PainFlagDetector
TypeScript couldn't see the function definition

decisions.decision: Fixed WorkspaceContext/EventLog import paths in dispatcher
decisions.rationale: Were importing from openclaw-sdk.js but should be from core modules

next_action: Decide: Accept 8 test failures as architectural consequence OR invest in mocking EvolutionTaskDispatcher at test level
context_notes: Fixed 3 of 11 test failures: registerEvolutionTaskSession export, readRecentPainContext wrapper, TypeScript compilation. Remaining 8 failures are due to tests mocking at worker level but dispatcher running real unmocked code.
